style_effects: Molten lava cracks glow with intense orange-red light beneath Venusaur's leaves, emitting shimmering heat waves that distort the air. Ember sparks drift upward in slow, rhythmic patterns, illuminating the scene with warm amber radiance. A crackling crimson aura pulses gently around its body, casting dynamic shadows. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
